prestazioni: VQ35DE (Rev-Up variant, 306hp stock) forced induction via Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (core dimensions: 24.8" x 11.8" x 3.5") and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for precise boost control up to 12 psi

Full bolt-on internals upgrade: JE 9.5:1 forged pistons (87.5mm bore), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (5.94" length), and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set (intake/exhaust lift: 10.5mm/10.0mm) with Tomei valve springs and titanium retainers to handle 8,000 RPM safely

Fuel system overhaul: Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -8AN lines to manage oil vapor from the VQ35DE’s PCV system under high boost
estetica: Vertex Japan Edge widebody kit (front fenders: +30mm, rear fenders: +50mm) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear bumper and a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards (ABS plastic, 4mm thickness)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece wheels (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear), mounted on BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg front/10kg rear spring rates) with Swift Springs helper springs for aggressive stance

Full interior carbon fiber conversion: VIS Racing carbon fiber door cards, shift knob, and e-brake handle, paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (S-size, FIA-approved) and a custom half-cage by Cusco (4-point, bolt-in, 2.5mm wall thickness) with harness bar for track use
